title: Step by Step Registration
content: Step by Step Registration IZU registration dates are in August-September. After being accepted to an undergraduate program at Istanbul Zaim University, should immediately start working on registration. should pay utmost attention to below instructions to experience a smooth process. Remember, registration process is time sensitive. lose accepted status in case are late to register. Be sure to finish registration process in advance. 1 st Step: The Certificate of Equivalence (Denklik Belgesi) The of equivalence certifies that education have taken is equivalent to education in Turkey. cannot enroll to a university in Turkey without of equivalence. Thus, it should be first step registration. Here is how obtain of equivalence. are required to submit original high school diploma transcripts of all years of education to one of following offices: The education counselors education attaché office of Turkey located in country where reside. Please click here to see list of educational attaché in country. may find this office inside Turkish Embassies or consulates. This is easiest, quickest surest way to obtain certificate. By obtaining before travelling to Turkey ensure that are eligible to enroll at a Turkish university. The offices of provincial national education directorate in Turkey. The closest one is located in Sultanahmet District, Istanbul. Work load of ministry in Istanbul spikes on August September. We strongly recommend to apply well in advance . Please click here to see location of Provincial Directorate of National Education. Important : consider this option only if there is not an attaché office in country. If have to apply in Istanbul then this cannot be first step; however, should understand that this is most important document registration. If live in Turkey, this should absolutely be 1 st step 2 nd Step: Payment of Tuition Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University is a non-profit foundation university. It is a type of university that is funded by charity student fee. Therefore, students are required to pay tuition prior to start of classes each semester. are required to present proof of payment at enrolment. The fees scholarships page explains important information regarding payment of fees scholarship. 3 rd Step: Accommodation should consider where to live in Istanbul before coming. If would like to apply IZU Student Guesthouses, should follow its application dates. Istanbul is second largest city in world with number of universities. So may find many options accommodation. 4 th Step: Travelling to Istanbul be allocated with a mentor before travel. It is best if purchase tickets journey with consultation as mentor might want to be there arrival. In case did not obtain of equivalence before travel, we would recommend to arrive in Istanbul at least 3 weeks before end of registration period. be allocated with a mentor before travel. It is best if purchase tickets journey with consultation as mentor might want to be there arrival. In case did not obtain of equivalence before travel, we would recommend to arrive in Istanbul at least 3 weeks before end of registration period. Be mindful of important dates when decide on travel plans. Participation orientation program is not option but a prerequisite registration. It is required to be present at orientation. If do not hold proficiency in language of program, then should take IZU language proficiency exam. Please follow updates regarding dates of proficiency exam as exam not be repeated. We urge to check International Student section of website. find  WELCOME KIT  there which is a booklet prepared with much effort to make everything easier you. Our team at international office provided answers to questions might address. shall find every little detail that may be useful in next four to five years. find which door to knock on which request in coming pages. especially find part how do I succeed at IZU crucial to learn how to avoid pitfalls be a successful student. Finally, find a brief introduction to life in Istanbul Turkey, which be guide not to survive but to thrive. 5 th Step: Registration Come to IZU Halkali Campus take along required documents others submitted in application. First, international office check authenticity of documents. Then be directed to office of student affairs where complete registration. Here is list of required documents registration; Acceptance Letter High School Diploma: Original apostilled copy. Transcript: Apostilled, translated, notarized. Passport: Identity validity pages, translated notarized. Dual Citizenship Documents: Relevant certificates. Citizenship Exit Documents: Exit or Blue Card. Entry-Exit Document: Travel dates Turkish citizens studying abroad. Legal Stay Document: Proof of legal stay in Türkiye. Language Proficiency Certificate: Approved by Turkish consulate. Tuition Fee Receipt Passport Photos: Four photos. Signed International Student Commitment Health Insurance: Proof within three months. Students missing original documents must submit them by end of academic year; otherwise, their registration be cancelled without a refund. Please keep us informed throughout process so that we may help you: international@izu.edu.tr

title: Apply to IZU
content: Apply to IZU Application Requirements Applications candidates graduated school or are in final year meet following criteria be considered: Foreign nationals, Those were nationals but later acquired citizenship, Those were born as but later renounced citizenship with permission Ministry of Interior, as well as minor children registered in renunciation document, provided they can certify that they hold Document on Exercise of Rights Granted under Citizenship Law (According to Article 7 of Citizenship Law No. 5901: (1) A child born in or outside Turkey to a citizen mother father within a marriage is considered a citizen.), entire in a country (excluding Republic of Northern Cyprus - TRNC) or in located in countries, reside in there with GCE A-Level exam results, as well as enrolled in colleges or between 2005-2010 obtained or are eligible to obtain GCE A-Level results, or entire in a country hold a TR-YÖS exam result. Applications candidates meeting following conditions be accepted: entire in Turkey or TRNC, (except entire in obtained GCE A-Level results, enrolled in colleges or between 2005-2010 obtained or obtain GCE A-Level results, or entire in a country hold a TR-YÖS result), Dual whose first nationality at birth was (except entire in a country excluding or in abroad), Dual citizens, one of whose nationalities is (except entire in obtained GCE A-Level results, enrolled in colleges or between 2005-2010 obtained or obtain GCE A-Level results, or entire in a country hold a TR-YÖS result), former (including Blue Card holders) nationals enroll in institutions 2022-2023 academic year onward (except studying in embassy schools, international private educational institutions listed in MOBIS system, nationals brought to Turkey under projects conducted by Ministry of National Education), or dual whose first nationality at birth was are studying at affiliated with embassies in Turkey or at in Turkey, Those been expelled a higher institution in Turkey due to disciplinary action. Application Documents Candidates must upload following documents to online application form: Application Form (The online application form must be through university's application system), Original a copy of High School Diploma , Official document school (for candidates yet received diploma) confirming that they graduate before universitys final registration date stated in academic calendar (in English or Turkish). If document is provided or graduation date is after final registration date, registration be cancelled , Transcript (An official document listing courses taken grades received in school, approved by relevant school administration. If in or English, it must be translated into one of these languages certified by a notary or a consulate), A copy of a valid identity document showing citizenship information, National or international school graduation exam results (e.g., Abitur, International Baccalaureate, Tawjihi, etc.). A list of accepted exams required scores is provided in Annex-1 , University entrance exam results (if applicable), such as SAT, ACT, TCS, etc. A list of accepted exams required scores is provided in Annex-2 , One passport-sized photo , Proof of legal stay in Türkiye applicants applying within country ( visa-exempt countries, legal stay period must expired ), Civil Registry Record (Vukuatli Nüfus Kayit Örnegi) dual were born as nationals later acquired citizenship, showing date of citizenship acquisition, along with a Name Equivalency Certificate or Citizenship Acquisition Certificate , Entry-exit records graduated abroad, proving that they were physically present in country while receiving education. Exams Validity Periods (1) High school graduation exams (e.g., General Secondary Education Certification, Abitur, International Baccalaureate, Tawjihi, etc.) no expiration period . (2) University entrance exams (e.g., SAT, ACT, TCS, etc.) are valid two years . Admission Calendar Listed below are application registration deadlines Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University undergraduate programs 2024-2025 Academic Year. Fall Intake Online Application (The results be notified to candidates within 2-4 weeks following submitting a complete application) January - June Deposit Payments The non-refundable deposit must be paid within 2 weeks after conditional acceptance is sent. IZU-YÖS 1 May IZU-YÖS 2 July Enrolment July NOTE: candidates applying inside of Türkiye must complete registration by August at latest. Language Placement / Proficiency Exams Class Adjustments (The student does take these exams or does present a valid language proficiency document is placed in A1 level of relevant Language Preparatory Class). First Week of September (Will be announced in August) Spring Intake Online Application (The results be notified to candidates within 2-4 weeks following submitting a complete application) (The results be notified to candidates within 2-4 weeks following submitting a complete application) July - October IZU-YÖS 3 November Deposit Payments The non-refundable deposit must be paid within 2 weeks after conditional acceptance is sent. Enrolment November - December NOTE: (Candidates applying within country are registered until 15 December at latest). Language Placement / Proficiency Exams Class Adjustments (The student does take these exams or does present a valid language proficiency document is placed in A1 level of relevant Foreign Language Preparatory Class). Second Week of January (Will be announced in December/January)

Education In Turkey The experience of studying abroad is more than just attending a school in a foreign country. title: Home
content: ABOUT US Health, Culture Sports Department was established with Higher Education Law 46 47 article. The Department of Health, Culture Sports aim to meet social needs of students staff, including; protection of physical mental health, nutrition, recreation leisure time. For this purpose, Department of Health, Culture Sports is responsible for construction operation of canteen, cafeteria, meeting conference rooms, sports facilities, health facilities in proportion to general facilities budget possibilities of university. In this direction, Health, Culture Sports Department targets to make best use of social, cultural sports activities, counseling guidance services for students to conduct research implementation in order to facilitate vital activities of disabled students to support education training at same time. SERVICES . To plan, conduct supervise students, academic administrative staff, health, culture sports services. . To provide services to students in fields of scholarship credit, nutrition, accommodation, work, rest leisure, transportation employment. . To provide follow-up, editing delivery of statistical information to relevant places, . To ensure that available resources such as people materials are used in most appropriate efficient way in order to fulfill service activities economically effectively, . Providing information flow by controlling activities of connected units transmitting results to General Secretary. . Establish, execute develop an effective recording file system within unit. . To prepare annual work programs in cooperation with relevant units, to present General Secretariat, . Ensuring that subordinates understand specified policies implementation of specified activities. . To set goals standards for future with personnel, place, materials other resources assigned to unit for execution, direction evaluation of unit activities, . Providing necessary guidance for subordinates, coordinating subordinates work, helping when necessary. . To examine, evaluate approve recommendations on personnel movements communicated to him by his subordinates. . To present General Secretary to identify tasks, powers responsibilities related to current staff, to identify any changes in special qualifications required to be assigned to these staff positions. . To establish a consistent coordinated communication cooperation arrangement between staff at front staff of other units with organic duties, to present Secretary General for approval. title: Department of Student Affairs
content: Department of Student Affairs ABOUT US The Department of Student Affairs is responsible for; keeping, updating archiving student files, moreover all transactions that are related to within framework of law, regulation general legislation. Student Affairs follows healthy execution of education training, informing staff directing them towards correct units according to their needs. It contributes to increase of institutional qualification by providing correct, fast modern services to students. SERVICES . The registration of who are placed in ÖSYM undergraduate programs of our university, . Registration of who are entitled to enroll in undergraduate programs of University by way of Horizontal Transit, . Registration of international to undergraduate programs at our university, . Registration renewal of students, class registration, dropping of courses and. following processes, . Requesting sending documents of related higher education institutions of coming going from horizontal transfer, . The Preparation of graduation transcripts submission to relevant departments, . Provisional graduation documents, preparation dissemination of diploma diploma documents, . YÖK, ÖSYM, KYK etc. related to education students. sending information documents to other institutions organizations, . Preparation of statistical data reports, student achievement status, credit, scholarship etc. Follow-up of transactions correspondence with related institutions, . Making necessary correspondences with units in university, MISSION The Department of Student Affairs works with our university during course study within framework of relevant laws regulations in shortest time possible. Also works in harmony with other units of University. VISION To be ranked first among units that are acclaimed by our by serving our a superior quality within national international standards.

title: Student Council
content: Student Council IZU Student Council is composed of volunteers who look after rights of students in providing and improving their education, health, sports and cultural needs of students in our university. Student representatives from Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University come together to form; faculty delegation committees and IZU Student Council, to further develop conditions of our university, to conduct research and evaluation for solutions in education, for research and student services, to present results to relevant units. Note: The tasks listed above are just a few of purposes of committee. The elections for IZU Department Representatives will be held on Wednesday 24.10.2018 in Building of Languages Square (Diller okulu meydani) between 10: 00-16: 30 for 2018-2019 academic year. For detailed information or application, please contact Department of Health Culture and Sports.

title: Student Clubs
content: Student Clubs We have 33 student clubs active in IZU. In addition to these clubs, we have a total of 9 Students Community's. Student Clubs and Student Communities have the opportunity to work with a team spirit by organizing many activities in; cultural, social, and sports area both inside and outside the campus. The experience and achievements of our students in these club and society activities, form an important place in their educational lives, as they also contribute positively to their professional skills. During the year, various activities such as; conferences, sports tournaments, workshops and trips suitable for the purpose of the clubs are organized. Clubs and Communities work intensively at student festivals held at the end of the year.

Program Countries Mobility Teaching of program academicians enables teaching to teach at least 2 days to a maximum of 2 months in another participating country. Full-time academics working in Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University can apply an to a partner university in any European Union member country where university have an interinstitutional agreement. How to Apply? Academics wish to apply must complete online application form at https://applyerasmus.izu.edu.tr/. Application Documents Online Application Form must be completed completely. photo must be attached to application form. If there is a Language Examination Result Certificate (TOEFL-IBT, TOEFL-CBT, TOEFL-PBT, YDS, YÖKDIL IELTS exams which accepted as equivalent by University) YDS YÖKDIL Language Examination documents will be evaluated by considering validity condition 5 years. validity period of other language proficiency certificates is 2 years.) Personnel disabilities should upload necessary document to system. Veteran personnel should upload honorary titel war veterans certificate to system. Minimum Requirements In order to participate in activity, academics must meet following minimum requirements: obligation to teach An interinstitutional agreement, made between institutions in which will teach Selection Criteria Evaluation criteria weighted points to be used evaluating applications as follows: Mobility Program Countries Assessment Criteria Criteria No Criteria Description Score 1 Benefiting program first time +5 2 Department/Faculty coordinator didn't benefit program before +5 3 wants to benefit program second time during same project period -20 4 If has benefited program during previous project period -10 5 If has benefited program during two previous project period -7 6 Disabled +10 7 To ensure signing an agreement a higher education institution during application period +10 8 To ensure signing an agreement in application period a higher education institution in a country where there is no bilateral agreement before +15 9 Veteran +10 10 is relative of a martyrs or veteran +10 11 If there is an invitation letter institution to be visited +5 12 Those gave up their right to participate on previous project without showing a compelling reason -10 13 academic certifying result of examination such as YÖKDIL, YDS, TOEFL, IELTS or equivalence examination accepted by OSYM will be awarded points as indicated in table on side. Or, academic graduated their PhD abroad will receive their foreign language points of +8 points, as if they would a Foreign Language Exam score between 81-90. Score Range Given Points 50-60 +2 61-70 +4 71-80 +6 81-90 +8 91-100 +10 If there is an equality in sort, following priorities applied in order until equality breaks down. Priority 1 have certified Foreign Language Adequacy. Priority 2 Service period in Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University (in years). Online applications ranked according to above measures.Candidates highest score selected as noble, spare ungranted within quotas. title: Counseling and Guidance
content: Psychological Counseling Guidance Psychological Counseling Guidance Unit is a unit affiliated to Department of Health, Culture Sports. The counseling service is provided in office which is in Halkali Campus. The Psychological Counseling Guidance Unit has two psychologists working full-time part-time. In Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University Psychological Counseling Guidance Unit, purpose is to support students; individual, social, academic professional development as well as to help their adaptation to university dormitory life, to help them gain necessary skills to cope with various problems that may arise during this process. Our Psychological Counseling Guidance Unit helps our students to understand themselves their environment better, helps them to discover their skills to develop their interpersonal communication skills. The academic administrative staff of Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University can also receive individual counseling from Psychological Counseling Guidance Unit. All services provided in Psychological Counseling Guidance Unit are free of charge. All activities carried out in unit are based on principle of confidentiality. However, if life of interviewee or someone they know is in danger, necessary people are contacted, student will be informed about contact. The Issues That Can Be Given Help Through Psychological Counselling (The Issues That Students Might Need Support from The Counselling Office)  Adaptation to University and/or Dormitory  Self-Confidence Issues  Test Anxiety  Fears Anxiety  Negativism Trust Issues  Conflicts within Family  Relationship Issues  Depression  Eating Disorders  Substance Abuse  Similar Issues Above If you are facing any of issues above or similar issues, please contact counselling services between 09:30  17:00 Merve ÖZKAN, Psychologist Phone: (0212) 692 9748 E-Mail: ozkan.merve@izu.edu.tr Days Available: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday Huriye ÇEVIK, Clinical Psychologist Office: Health Culture Sports Department Phone: (0212) 692 9748 E-Mail: huriye.cevik@izu.edu.tr Only available on Wednesdays

title: International Collaborations
content: Collaborations The Erasmus + Student Mobility Program is a higher education program aimed at increasing quality of higher education in Europe envisaging "international mobility of university students" by encouraging cooperation between universities from different countries. The Erasmus program is financed by European Union students receives a grant chance to study in different European countries for a certain period of time. The Erasmus program is coordinated by IZU Office. Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim has Erasmus + agreement with 38 universities in 20 countries. Up to now(today), a total of 70 students have successfully completed Erasmus study internship mobility program. Our students benefited from mobility in almost all European countries, especially in Germany, France, Italy Poland. At same time IZU accepts a great number of exchange students from Europe every semester with programs offering 100% 30% English. In addition to Erasmus program, we are developing collaborations with important universities from other parts of world. These cooperation programs include student-academic exchanges, joint symposia conferences, joint research projects, master's PHDs.Some of these cooperation agreements are; Major American universities such as Duke Mary Washington, our students have opportunity to be a student of change, take (taking)summer courses take(taking) advantage of English language education.For Department of Sciences, where Arabic language education is important,we have agreements with of Jordan World Science & Education in Jordan.In Addition conferences are held every year in with Universiti Utara Malaysia. Below you will find a list of other universities similar universities with similar cooperation programs like these. For more detailed information, please contact IZU Office at link below. title: 2018-2019 - Staff Mobility for Teaching Application Announcement
content: 2018-2019 - Application Announcement 2018-2019 Application Results 2018-2019 ACADEMIC YEAR (19 September 2018 - 31 May 2019) ERASMUS+ STAFF MOBILITY FOR TEACHING APPLICATION ANNOUNCEMENT Project Number: 2017-1-TR01-KA103-037611 Calendar 30 June 2018 2018-2019 Academic Year announcement 31 July 2018 2018-2019 Academic Year starting date applications 31 August 2018 2018-2019 Academic Year end date applications 2 September 2018 Preliminary assessment announcement 3-7 September 2018 Preliminary assessment objection withdrawal dates 8 September 2018 Announcement of Selected, Spare without applicants announcement of placement results. For possible changes made to calendar our personnel can follow up on web page of IZU Erasmus Institution Coordinator. Important Note: Dates of participation of applicants in mobility is between 19.09.2018 / 31.05.2019. Program Countries Erasmus + enables teaching to teach at least 2 days to a maximum of 2 months in another participating country. Full-time academics working in Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University can apply an Erasmus + to a partner university in any European Union member country where we have an agreement. How to Apply? Academics wish to apply must complete online application form at https://applyerasmus.izu.edu.tr/ . Application Documents Complete Online Application Form. photo must be attached to application form. If there is a Certificate of Language (TOEFL-IBT, TOEFL-CBT, TOEFL-PBT, YDS, YÖKDIL IELTS exams are accepted as equivalent by University) YDS YÖKDIL Language Examination documents will be evaluated by taking 5 years of validity into consideration. validity period of other language proficiency certificates is 2 years.) Disabled must upload their document into system. Martyrs or veterans must upload their documents into system. is relative of martyrs or veteran must upload their documents into system. If higher education is completed in a foreign language, it must be documented. Minimum Requirements In order to participate in activity, must meet following minimum requirements: Personnel are obliged to teach. There should be an Inter-Institutional Agreement Host institution Evaluation Criteria Evaluation criteria weighted points to be used evaluating mobility applications are as follows: Program Countries Evaluation Criteria Criteria No Criteria Description Criteria Rating 1 Benefiting program first time +5 2 Departmental Coordinator did not benefit before. +5 3 Benefiting program second time during same project period -20 4 If has benefited program during previous project period -10 5 If has benefited program during two previous project period -7 6 Disabled +10 7 If signed an Inter-Institutional Agreement a higher education institution in application period +10 8 To ensure signing of an agreement a higher education institution in a country where there was no Inter-Institutional Agreement before +15 9 Veteran +10 10 is relative of a martyrs or veteran +10 11 If there is an invitation letter institution to be visited +5 12 Those gave up their right to participate on previous project without showing a compelling reason -10 13 academic certifying result of examination such as YÖKDIL, YDS, TOEFL, IELTS or equivalence examination accepted by OSYM will be awarded points as indicated in table on side. Or in absence of a valid Foreign Language Certificate, Foreign Language Score will be accepted in 81-90 band +8 points will be added to score point PhD Degrees taken a foreign country. Score Range Given Points 50-60 +2 61-70 +4 71-80 +6 81-90 +8 91-100 +10 If there is an equality in sort, following priorities are applied in order until equality breaks down. 1. Priority documented their language proficiency 2. Priority Service period in Istanbul Sabahattin Zaim University (in years). Online Applications received are evaluated sorted according to criterias above. applicants highest score are selected as selected grant, spare without grant. With Grant amount of daily to be given to employees will benefit mobility teaching is determined by National Agency by taking into consideration living standards of countries: Country Groups Country Daily amounts (EUR) 1.Group Denmark, Ireland, Netherlands, Sweden, UK 144  2.Group Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Finland, France, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Liechtenstein, Luxembourg, Norway, Poland, Romania, Turkey* 126  3.Group Macedonia, Germany, Latvia, Malta, Portugal, Slovak Republic, Spain 108  4.Group Croatia, Estonia, Lithuanian, Slovenia 90  80% of Erasmus is deposited in Euro account stated by beneficiary in contract signed personnel will benefit mobility after return remaining 20% is completed. 2018-2019 academic year mobility is activities held between 19 September 2018 31 May 2019. Calculation of deserved of higher education institution benefiting is done by of higher education institution within framework of calculation rules determined by Center (National Agency). According to rules determined by Center, personnel benefit mobility are paid according to daily / weekly allowance travel distance. Travel payment is a contribution to travel subsistence expenses period spent abroad. travel expense payment is a contribution to travel costs of participants where they reside to their place of activity return. Travel distance is calculated using distance calculator provided by European Commission. Only one time added to participant's grant. Obtained KM value Grant Amount (EUR Between 100-499 km 180  Between 500-1999 km 275  Between 2000-2999 km 360  Between 3000-3999 km 530  Between 4000-7999 km 820  Between 8000 km 1.100  given to benefiting is not intended to cover all expenses related to period abroad. Without option Personnel may use this right at time of application by using Without Grant preference in online form or by notifying Erasmus Institution Coordinator after results have been announced. Additional Grants Special Needs Owners persons disabilities, can receive additional grants according to their specific needs. For more information, please contact Erasmus Institution Coordinator. Quotas Total Grant Quota Amount With Grant 6 With Grant Spare 5 Without Grant Optional Grant Calculation Personnel selected mobility will receive 5 days of travel support. Ex: 5 X Daily amount of travel country + travel based on km calculated by destination country

title: December 27, 2018 - 10-00 Erasmus Arabic Language Proficiency Exam
content: December 27, 2018 - 10:00 Erasmus Arabic Language Proficiency Exam December 27, 2018 - 10:00 Erasmus Arabic Language Proficiency Exam Results Erasmus + 2018-2019 Spring - ICM  Tunisia  Ez-Zitouna Application for Student Mobility for Studies for the Faculty of Islamic Sciences last application date is on December 26, 2018 10:00 oclock. For the applicants applying above mentioned mobility, the School of Languages will hold an Erasmus Arabic Language Proficiency Exam on December 27, 2018 at 10:00. The Erasmus Language Proficiency Exam for the mobilities mentioned is as follows. Exam Date : December 27, 2018 Time: 10:00 Location: School of Languages (location will be updated.) The list of applicants whose application for the Erasmus Language Proficiency Exam is approved will be published under this announcement. Erasmus Office Contact: erasmus@izu.edu.tr
